title: Community-Support | Raleigh Hills Business Association
description: In order to continue to be good community stewards we are offering Sponsorship opportunities for the Shred Event, April 20, 2024 from 9am to Noon at the AAA Office Building on Apple Way. Each sponsor who donates to this event will have their name on the banner. Donation amounts listed on the application/form
htmlMain:
In order to continue to be good community stewards we are offering Sponsorship opportunities for the Shred Event, April 20, 2024 from 9am to Noon at the AAA Office Building on Apple Way.

Each sponsor who donates to this event will have their name on the banner.

Donation amounts listed on the application/form are:

$250 - Top Billing on the Sponsor Banner
$100 - Listed on Sponsor Banner
$50  - Listed on Sponsor Banner
Other  - Donations acknowledged on our website

To insure your name gets printed on the banner your donation needs to be submitted by March 13th, donations after the deadline will receive acknowledgment but will not be printed on the banner.

Once   your payment has been made please reach out to: Bev Snow-Kuehn, info@raleighhillsbusinessassn.org, 503-452-0071.

Download a copy of our Sponsorship Package

For further information  contact us at info@raleighhillsbusinessassn.org
